narrative:
Scioto-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,585 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
